pll.name: A-perm (a)
pll.algorithm: x R' U R' D2 R U' R' D2 R2 x'
alternates: y x' R2 D2 R' U' R D2 R' U R'
R' F R' B2 R F' R' B2 R2
pll.recognition: Three-corner cycle clockwise; headlights on the back
pll.setup: x R2 D2 R U R' D2 R U' R x'

pll.name: A-perm (b)
pll.algorithm: x R2 D2 R U R' D2 R U' R x'
alternates: x' R2 D2 R' U' R D2 R' U R'
R B' R F2 R' B R F2 R2
pll.recognition: Three-corner cycle counter-clockwise; headlights on the back
pll.setup: x R' U R' D2 R U' R' D2 R2 x'

pll.name: E-perm
pll.algorithm: x' R U' R' D R U R' D' R U R' D R U' R' D' x
alternates: x' L' U L D' L' U' L D L' U' L D' L' U L D
pll.recognition: Two diagonal corner swaps; no headlights, opposite colors on adjacent corners
pll.setup: x' D R U R' D' R U' R' D R U' R' D' R U R' x

pll.name: F-perm
pll.algorithm: R' U' F' R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R' U' R U R' U R
alternates: R' U R U' R2 F' U' F U R F R' F' R2
pll.recognition: Front edge and two corners swap; headlights on left, front edge swap
pll.setup: R' U' R U' R' U R U R2 F' R U R U' R' F U R

pll.name: G-perm (a)
pll.algorithm: R2 U R' U R' U' R U' R2 U' D R' U R D'
alternates: R2 u R' U R' U' R u' R2 y' R' U R
pll.recognition: 3-edge cycle clockwise + 3-corner cycle counter-clockwise
pll.setup: D R' U' R D' U R2 U R' U R U' R U' R2

pll.name: G-perm (b)
pll.algorithm: R' U' R U D' R2 U R' U R U' R U' R2 D
alternates: F' U' F R2 u R' U R U' R u' R2
pll.recognition: 3-edge cycle counter-clockwise + 3-corner cycle clockwise (mirror of Ga)
pll.setup: D' R2 U R' U R' U' R U' R2 D U' R' U R

pll.name: G-perm (c)
pll.algorithm: R2 U' R U' R U R' U R2 U D' R U' R' D
alternates: R2 u' R U' R U R' u R2 y R U' R'
pll.recognition: 3-edge cycle counter-clockwise + 3-corner cycle clockwise (different angle)
pll.setup: D' R U R' D U' R2 U' R U' R' U R' U R2

pll.name: G-perm (d)
pll.algorithm: R U R' U' D R2 U' R U' R' U R' U R2 D'
alternates: f R f' R2 u' R U' R' U R' u R2
pll.recognition: 3-edge cycle clockwise + 3-corner cycle counter-clockwise (different angle)
pll.setup: D R2 U' R U' R U R' U R2 D' U R U' R'

pll.name: H-perm
pll.algorithm: M2 U M2 U2 M2 U M2
alternates: R2 U2 R U2 R2 U2 R2 U2 R U2 R2
pll.recognition: Two opposite edge pairs swap; all four corners solved, all edges show opposite colors
pll.setup: M2 U' M2 U2 M2 U' M2

pll.name: J-perm (a)
pll.algorithm: x R2 F R F' R U2 r' U r U2 x'
alternates: L' U' L F L' U' L U L F' L2 U L
R' U L' U2 R U' R' U2 R L
pll.recognition: Adjacent corner+edge swap on left side; headlights on right
pll.setup: x U2 r' U' r U2 R' F R' F' R2 x'

pll.name: J-perm (b)
pll.algorithm: R U R' F' R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R'
alternates: R U2 R' U' R U2 L' U R' U' L
pll.recognition: Adjacent corner+edge swap on right side; headlights on left
pll.setup: R U R2 F' R U R U' R' F R U' R'

pll.name: N-perm (a)
pll.algorithm: R U R' U R U R' F' R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R' U2 R U' R'
alternates: L U' R U2 L' U R' L U' R U2 L' U R'
pll.recognition: Diagonal corner+edge swap; pair of headlights on opposite sides
pll.setup: R U R' U2 R U R2 F' R U R U' R' F R U' R' U' R U' R'

pll.name: N-perm (b)
pll.algorithm: R' U R U' R' F' U' F R U R' F R' F' R U' R
alternates: r' D' F r U' r' F' D r2 U r' U' r' F r F'
pll.recognition: Diagonal corner+edge swap; mirror of Na
pll.setup: R' U R' F R F' R U' R' F' U F R U R' U' R

pll.name: R-perm (a)
pll.algorithm: R U' R' U' R U R D R' U' R D' R' U2 R'
alternates: L U2 L' U2 L F' L' U' L U L F L2
pll.recognition: Two adjacent edges + two adjacent corners; bookends on right
pll.setup: R U2 R D R' U R D' R' U' R' U R U R'

pll.name: R-perm (b)
pll.algorithm: R' U2 R U2 R' F R U R' U' R' F' R2
alternates: R2 F R U R U' R' F' R U2 R' U2 R
pll.recognition: Two adjacent edges + two adjacent corners; bookends on left
pll.setup: R2 F R U R U' R' F' R U2 R' U2 R

pll.name: T-perm
pll.algorithm: R U R' U' R' F R2 U' R' U' R U R' F'
pll.recognition: Adjacent corner swap (right side) + adjacent edge swap (right side); headlights on left
pll.setup: F R U' R' U R U R2 F' R U R U' R'

pll.name: U-perm (a)
pll.algorithm: R U' R U R U R U' R' U' R2
alternates: M2 U M U2 M' U M2
y2 R2 U' R' U' R U R U R U' R
pll.recognition: Three-edge cycle counter-clockwise; headlights match on three sides
pll.setup: R2 U R U R' U' R' U' R' U R'

pll.name: U-perm (b)
pll.algorithm: R2 U R U R' U' R' U' R' U R'
alternates: M2 U' M U2 M' U' M2
y2 R' U R' U' R' U' R' U R U R2
pll.recognition: Three-edge cycle clockwise; headlights match on three sides
pll.setup: R U' R U R U R U' R' U' R2

pll.name: V-perm
pll.algorithm: y' R' U R' U' y R' F' R2 U' R' U R' F R F
alternates: y' R' U R' d' R' F' R2 U' R' U R' F R F
pll.recognition: Diagonal corner swap + adjacent edge swap (front+left)
pll.setup: F' R' F' R U' R U R2 F R y' U R U' R y

pll.name: Y-perm
pll.algorithm: F R U' R' U' R U R' F' R U R' U' R' F R F'
pll.recognition: Diagonal corner swap + adjacent edge swap (front+right)
pll.setup: F R' F' R U R U' R' F R U' R' U R U R' F'

pll.name: Z-perm
pll.algorithm: M2 U M2 U M' U2 M2 U2 M'
alternates: M' U M2 U M2 U M' U2 M2
R U R' U R' U' R' U R U' R' U' R2 U R
pll.recognition: Two adjacent edge pairs swap; checkered edge pattern, all corners solved
pll.setup: M U2 M2 U2 M U' M2 U' M2

oll.name: Runway / Dot
oll.algorithm: R U2 R2 F R F' U2 R' F R F'
oll.recognition: Dot case; two yellow stickers facing front and back on the U-layer corners' edges
oll.setup: F R' F' R U2 F R' F' R2 U2 R'

oll.name: Zamboni / Dot
oll.algorithm: F R U R' U' F' f R U R' U' f'
alternates: r U r' U2 r U2 R' U2 R U' r'
oll.recognition: Dot case; yellow stickers face out on left and right corner-edges
oll.setup: f U R U' R' f' F U R U' R' F'

oll.name: Anti-Nazi / Dot
oll.algorithm: f R U R' U' f' U' F R U R' U' F'
oll.recognition: Dot case; yellow bar offset from F/B by U' position
oll.setup: F U R U' R' F' U f U R U' R' f'

oll.name: Nazi / Dot
oll.algorithm: f R U R' U' f' U F R U R' U' F'
oll.setup: F U R U' R' F' U' f U R U' R' f'

oll.name: Lightning / Square (a)
oll.algorithm: r' U2 R U R' U r
oll.recognition: Square shape on top-left; mirror of OLL 6
oll.setup: r' U' R U' R' U2 r

oll.name: Lightning / Square (b)
oll.algorithm: r U2 R' U' R U' r'
oll.setup: r U R' U R U2 r'

oll.name: Small Lightning Bolt (a)
oll.algorithm: r U R' U R U2 r'
alternates: L' U2 L U2 L F' L' F
oll.setup: r U2 R' U' R U' r'

oll.name: Small Lightning Bolt (b)
oll.algorithm: r' U' R U' R' U2 r
alternates: R U2 R' U2 R' F R F'
oll.recognition: Lightning bolt pointing into front-left; mirror of OLL 7
oll.setup: r' U2 R U R' U r

oll.name: Fish (a)
oll.algorithm: R U R' U' R' F R2 U R' U' F'
oll.recognition: Fish shape; sune-like but with edge flipped
oll.setup: F U R U' R2 F' R U R U' R'

oll.name: Fish (b)
oll.algorithm: R U R' U R' F R F' R U2 R'
oll.setup: R U2 R' F R' F' R U' R U' R'

oll.name: Small Lightning Bolt (c)
oll.algorithm: r U R' U R' F R F' R U2 r'
alternates: r' R2 U R' U R U2 R' U M'
oll.setup: r U2 R' F R' F' R U' R U' r'

oll.name: Small Lightning Bolt (d)
oll.algorithm: F R U R' U' F' U F R U R' U' F'
alternates: M' R' U' R U' R' U2 R U' R r'
oll.recognition: Lightning shape variant; mirror of OLL 11
oll.setup: F U R U' R' F' U' F U R U' R' F'

oll.name: Knight Move Shape (a)
oll.algorithm: r U' r' U' r U r' F' U F
alternates: F U R U' R2 F' R U R U' R'
oll.setup: F' U' F r U' r' U r U r'

oll.name: Knight Move Shape (b)
oll.algorithm: R' F R U R' F' R F U' F'
alternates: l' U l U l' U' l F U' F'
oll.setup: F U F' R' F R U' R' F' R

oll.name: Knight Move Shape (c)
oll.algorithm: r' U' r R' U' R U r' U r
alternates: l' U' l L' U' L U l' U l
oll.setup: r' U' r U' R' U R r' U r

oll.name: Knight Move Shape (d)
oll.algorithm: r U r' R U R' U' r U' r'
oll.setup: r U r' U R U' R' r U' r'

oll.name: Awkward / Dot (a)
oll.algorithm: R U R' U R' F R F' U2 R' F R F'
alternates: F R' F' R U S' R U' R' S
oll.recognition: Dot case with two diagonally-opposed yellow corners
oll.setup: F R' F' R U2 F R' F' R U' R U' R'

oll.name: Awkward / Dot (b)
oll.algorithm: r U R' U R U2 r' r' U' R U' R' U2 r
alternates: F R U R' U y' R' U2 R' F R F'
oll.setup: r' U2 R U R' U r r U2 R' U' R U' r'

oll.name: Awkward (a)
oll.algorithm: M U R U R' U' M' R' F R F'
alternates: r' R U R U R' U' r R2 F R F'
oll.recognition: Awkward shape; needs M-slice or wide-r
oll.setup: F R' F' R M U R U' R' U' M'

oll.name: Awkward / H
oll.algorithm: M U R U R' U' M2 U R U' r'
alternates: r U R' U' M2 U R U' R' U' M'
oll.setup: r U R' U' M2 U R U' R' U' M'

oll.name: Cross / H (a)
oll.algorithm: R U2 R' U' R U R' U' R U' R'
alternates: F R U R' U' R U R' U' R U R' U' F'
y R U R' U R U' R' U R U2 R'
oll.recognition: Cross with all 4 corners unoriented in H symmetry
oll.setup: R U R' U R U' R' U R U2 R'

oll.name: Cross / Pi
oll.algorithm: R U2 R2 U' R2 U' R2 U2 R
alternates: f R U R' U' f' F R U R' U' R U R' U' F'
oll.recognition: Cross with Pi corner orientation; two opposite corners face out same way
oll.setup: R' U2 R2 U R2 U R2 U2 R'

oll.name: Cross / Headlights
oll.algorithm: R2 D R' U2 R D' R' U2 R'
oll.recognition: Cross + two corners oriented + two adjacent corners with headlights
oll.setup: R U2 R D R' U2 R D' R2

oll.name: Cross / Chameleon
oll.algorithm: r U R' U' r' F R F'
alternates: x' R U R' D R U' R' D'
oll.recognition: Cross + two oriented corners + chameleon corner pattern
oll.setup: F R' F' r U R U' r'

oll.name: Cross / Bowtie
oll.algorithm: F' r U R' U' r' F R
alternates: x' R U' R' D R U R' D'
oll.setup: R' F' r U R U' r' F

oll.name: Cross / Anti-Sune
oll.algorithm: R U2 R' U' R U' R'
alternates: L' U' L U' L' U2 L
oll.setup: R U R' U R U2 R'

oll.name: Cross / Sune
oll.algorithm: R U R' U R U2 R'
alternates: L' U2 L U L' U L
oll.setup: R U2 R' U' R U' R'

oll.name: Square (a)
oll.algorithm: r U R' U' r' R U R U' R'
alternates: M' U M U2 M' U M
oll.setup: R U R' U' R' r U R U' r'

oll.name: Awkward (b)
oll.algorithm: R U R' U' R U' R' F' U' F R U R'
alternates: r2 D' r U r' D r2 U' r' U' r
oll.setup: R U' R' F' U F R U R' U R U' R'

oll.name: Awkward (c)
oll.algorithm: F R' F R2 U' R' U' R U R' F2
alternates: r' D' r U' r' D r2 U' r' U r U r'
oll.setup: F2 R U' R' U R U R2 F' R F'

oll.name: P (a)
oll.algorithm: R' U' F U R U' R' F' R
oll.recognition: P-shape; yellow pi-shape on side with single corner
oll.setup: R' F R U R' U' F' U R

oll.name: P (b)
oll.algorithm: L U F' U' L' U L F L'
alternates: S R U R' U' R' F R f'
R U B' U' R' U R B R'
oll.setup: L F' L' U' L U F U' L'

oll.name: T (a)
oll.algorithm: R U R' U' R' F R F'
oll.setup: F R' F' R U R U' R'

oll.name: C (a)
oll.algorithm: R U R2 U' R' F R U R U' F'
alternates: f R F R' U R' U' F2 R
oll.setup: F U R' U' R' F' R U R2 U' R'

oll.name: Fish (c)
oll.algorithm: R U2 R2 F R F' R U2 R'
oll.setup: R U2 R' F R' F' R2 U2 R'

oll.name: W (a)
oll.algorithm: L' U' L U' L' U L U L F' L' F
alternates: R U R2 F' U' F U R2 U2 R'
oll.setup: F' L F L' U' L' U' L U L' U L

oll.name: Fish (d)
oll.algorithm: F R' F' R U R U' R'
oll.setup: R U R' U' R' F R F'

oll.name: W (b)
oll.algorithm: R U R' U R U' R' U' R' F R F'
oll.setup: F R' F' R U R U R' U' R U' R'

oll.name: Big Lightning (a)
oll.algorithm: L F' L' U' L U F U' L'
alternates: R B' R' U' R U B U' R'
oll.setup: L U F' U' L' U L F L'

oll.name: Big Lightning (b)

alternates: L B L' U L U' B' U' L
oll.setup: R' U' F U R U' R' F' R

oll.name: Awkward (d)
oll.algorithm: R U R' U R U2 R' F R U R' U' F'
oll.setup: F U R U' R' F' R U2 R' U' R U' R'

oll.name: Awkward (e)
oll.algorithm: R' U' R U' R' U2 R F R U R' U' F'

oll.setup: F U R U' R' F' R' U2 R U R' U R

oll.name: P (c)

alternates: f' L' U' L U f
R' U' F' U F R
oll.setup: F' L' U' L U F

oll.name: P (d)

alternates: F U R U' R' F'

oll.name: T (b)

oll.name: C (b)

oll.setup: R' U' F R' F' R U R

alternates: F' L' U' L U L' U' L U F

oll.setup: F U R U' R' U R U' R' F'

alternates: f R U R' U' R U R' U' f'

oll.algorithm: R' F' U' F U' R U R' U R
alternates: R U R' U R U' B U' B' R'
R U R' U R d' R U' R' F'

alternates: l' U' L U' L' U L U' L' U2 l

F R U R' U' R F' r U R' U' r'

advanced.corner_state: WP facing side, colors match; slot-switch insert
advanced.algorithm: y' R' U R U' d' R U R'

advanced.corner_state: WP facing side, colors match; slot-switch insert mirror
advanced.algorithm: R U' R' U d R' U' R

advanced.corner_state: WP facing side, colors opposite; deep case
advanced.algorithm: U' R U2 R' d R' U' R

advanced.corner_state: WP facing side, colors opposite; awkward case
advanced.algorithm: R' U2 R2 U R2 U R

advanced.corner_state: WP facing side, colors opposite
advanced.algorithm: d R' U R U' R' U' R

advanced.corner_state: WP facing side, colors opposite
advanced.algorithm: U' R U' R' U R U R'

advanced.corner_state: WP facing UP; corner above slot
advanced.algorithm: R U2 R' U' R U R'

advanced.corner_state: WP facing UP; mirror angle
advanced.algorithm: y' R' U2 R U R' U' R

advanced.corner_state: WP facing UP; difficult case requiring rotation
advanced.algorithm: y' U R' U2 R y R U2 R' U R U' R'

advanced.corner_state: WP facing UP; difficult case mirror
advanced.algorithm: U' R U2 R' y' R' U2 R U' R' U R

advanced.corner_state: Corner solved in slot; edge in U above slot
advanced.algorithm: y' R' U' R U R' U' R

advanced.corner_state: Corner solved in slot; edge in U above slot mirror
advanced.algorithm: R U R' U' R U R'

advanced.corner_state: Corner solved in slot; edge in U other side
advanced.algorithm: R U' R' U R U' R'

advanced.corner_state: Corner solved in slot; edge in U other side mirror
advanced.algorithm: y' R' U R U' R' U R

advanced.corner_state: Edge solved in slot (bottom layer); corner in U
advanced.algorithm: U' R U' R' U2 R U' R'

advanced.corner_state: Edge solved in slot; corner in U mirror
advanced.algorithm: d R' U R U2 R' U R

advanced.corner_state: Edge solved in slot; corner in U other angle
advanced.algorithm: U' R U R' d R' U' R

advanced.corner_state: Edge solved in slot; corner in U other angle mirror
advanced.algorithm: d R' U' R d' R U R'

advanced.corner_state: Edge solved in slot; corner in U near
advanced.algorithm: R U' R' d R' U R

advanced.corner_state: Edge solved in slot; corner in U (3-sexy case)
advanced.algorithm: (R U R' U') (R U R' U') (R U R')

advanced.corner_state: Both pieces in slot (variant)
advanced.algorithm: R U' R' d R' U' R U' R' U' R

advanced.corner_state: Both pieces in slot (variant)
advanced.algorithm: R U R' U' R U' R' U2 y' R' U' R

advanced.corner_state: Both pieces in slot (hardest case)

beginner.name: WP-top, paired right-insert
beginner.method: corner: WP on top; corner above slot | edge: edge in U layer paired with corner, oriented

beginner.name: WP-top, paired left-insert (mirror)
beginner.method: corner: WP on top; corner above slot, mirror angle | edge: edge in U, paired on left

beginner.name: WP-side colors-match, separated
beginner.method: corner: WP facing side; FL color matches edge — corner above slot | edge: edge in U, separated from corner
beginner.algorithm: U' R U R' U2 R U' R'

beginner.name: WP-side colors-match, separated (mirror)
beginner.method: corner: WP facing side; FL color matches — alternate angle | edge: edge in U, separated
beginner.algorithm: d R' U' R U2 R' U R

beginner.name: WP-side colors-match, far position
beginner.method: corner: WP facing side, colors match; deep case | edge: edge in U, far from corner
beginner.algorithm: U' R U2 R' U2 R U' R'

beginner.name: WP-side colors-match, far position (mirror)
beginner.method: corner: WP facing side, colors match; deep case mirror | edge: edge in U, far
beginner.algorithm: d R' U2 R U2 R' U R

beginner.name: WP-side colors-opposite, simple
beginner.method: corner: WP facing side; FL color OPPOSITE to edge — simple | edge: edge above slot, paired

beginner.name: WP-side colors-opposite, simple (mirror)
beginner.method: corner: WP facing side, colors opposite — simple | edge: edge above slot, paired

beginner.name: WP-side colors-opposite, slot-switch
